title: ScrapMine
description: Mod about Scrap Mechanic for MC
body:
## _**Calling all mechanics!**_
### _TA Studio presents to you..._
![SCRAPMINE_MOD_PREVIEW.Gif]()

<details>
<summary>Some silly description</summary>

_Mod is a transfer of the game Scrap Mechanic to Minecraft! And... I don’t even know what to describe here...
Oh yes! Exactly! I'll just copy the description from Steam and edit it a little..._

</details>

### **LORE**

**_‘Be a robot mechanic’, they said. ‘Easy money’, they said. We’re pretty sure the job description didn’t mention crash landing on a far away planet, with thousands of crazed worker robots out for blood! You’re stranded on a faraway agriculture planet where the Farmbots working the fields have gone haywire. With your tool belt tightly fastened, there’s only one way to survive: using your quick thinking, creativity and a wily knack of turning your surroundings to your advantage!_**
(At the end, Create is described rather than this mod...)

<details>
<summary>Some silly description 2</summary>

_I was told that I need to describe my entire mod... So...
Perhaps we need to make separating blocks for each version? Hmm... Okay..._

</details>

### **Pre-ALPHA**

![Totebot.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/584617d7327e4f0de92d73e76b640f5ede967177.png)
_**Green Totebot**_\
Welcome to the little bot that once just carried boxes and various parts, but now wants to get rid of you! This is the weakest bot in the mod. I don't think he can harm you in any way... But who knows?

![Farmbot.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5e59774c0c4e626e668f9baa46ebac5fa863f59.png)
_**Farmbot**_\
The bot that once pollinated and harvested crops now wants your death! Currently the strongest bot in the mod. Most likely, if you decide to keep him as a pet, only the rubble left over from your home will await you.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nmqTjnkNYuU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

_**Sledgehammer**_\
If you don't have enough wood, you can use your favorite... sledgehammer...? In fact, this is not the most effective way to get wood, there are more effective ways.

### **ALPHA**

Yes. We changed description a lil.
Don't worry about the title image disappearing.
